description_long: This is a single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a prominent cross-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade features a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by two garage doors on the left. The exterior walls are clad in light gray siding, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and side elevations, with white trim. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn bordered by a brown base, suggesting a landscaped yard. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a simple, functional design with minimal ornamentation. The overall appearance is inviting and practical, suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A Craftsman-style bungalow with a cross-gabled dark roof, covered front porch, double garage, and light gray siding, set on a landscaped plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, double garage doors, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting a single window and the side profile of the garage and porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three evenly spaced windows and a back door, with a simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a single window and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
